emails.subject: Sempra
emails.body: Fred, I looked at volumes, below is what we need to sell Sempra. Please let keep us posted. Thanks Frank Month # K Rec. Amt. MMBTU Nov. 3.04 263 8,000,000 10000 Dec. 3.18 157 5,000,000 10000 Jan. 3.31 211 7,000,000 10000 632 Contracts to sell

emails.subject: RE: Sempra
emails.body: RE: Sempra I have no idea what this is but don't do anything Fred until I find out

emails.subject: RE: Sempra
emails.body: Fred, My apologies, I was mistaken Frank
